mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO doc_asset_ref ( document_id, asset_id, ref_scope, created_at, is_deleted, deletor_id, delete_time ) VALUES
(#{ref.documentId}, #{ref.assetId}, #{ref.refScope}, #{ref.createdAt}, 0, NULL, NULL)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE created_at = VALUES(created_at), is_deleted = 0, deletor_id = NULL, delete_time = NULL

INSERT INTO doc_asset_ref ( document_id, asset_id, ref_scope, created_at, is_deleted, deletor_id, delete_time ) SELECT document_id, asset_id, 'PUBLISHED', NOW(), 0, NULL, NULL FROM doc_asset_ref WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND ref_scope = 'DRAFT' AND is_deleted = 0 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE created_at = VALUES(created_at), is_deleted = 0, deletor_id = NULL, delete_time = NULL
